title: Implement Evidence Gate (Phase A: threshold=0.0 pass-through)
description: Add evidence gate between retrieval and LLM generation. Phase A uses threshold=0.0 (pass-through) to capture score distributions without blocking. Gate uses post-rerank Citation.score.
acceptance_criteria: EvidenceGateService class with should_abstain(citations, config) method
Gate uses citations[0].score (post-rerank) as score source
Two abstention modes: no_context (empty citations) vs evidence_gate_abstain (low score)
ChatService.answer() and stream_answer_sse() call gate after build_citations()
Trace enriched with evidence_gate_result (triggered, top1_score, threshold)
Phase A: threshold defaults to 0.0 (all pass, just capturing scores)
All user-facing abstention messages are Chinese (PM Template A)
implementation_steps: 2. Add evidence_gate config section to system_config schema
3. Integrate gate into ChatService.answer() after build_citations()
4. Add _build_evidence_gate_response() with Chinese Template A message
6. Set default threshold to 0.0 in system_config.json
